descFull: Let AI write the code — you own the view. Termdock: the AI-native terminal for macOS & Windows. Claude Code / Codex / Gemini / GitLab Duo agent sessions, diff impact analysis, visual Git review, and a fully customizable backdrop (your images, themes, fonts). GPU-fast, battery-kind.
